name: mia-marketplace
description: Community-curated collection of Claude Code plugins, created and shared by Makers IA members. (makersia.com)

plugins.name: statusline
plugins.description: Status line with context window, git, cost, rate limits, and cache stats.

plugins.name: crystools-skills
plugins.description: Open collection of AI agent skills — reusable, framework-agnostic SKILL.md packages

plugins.name: agents-talk
plugins.description: Chat-like monitor for agent-to-agent communication. Logs colored, timestamped messages with duration, tokens, and tool counts.
